Nelumbo nucifera, also known as Nania or Nania chrysantha, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Nelumbo nucifera include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Nelumbo nucifera are teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
